targetLang.hint: Overrides output language; "Off" uses the prompt's default.

chat.sendMessage: Send a message to start the conversation.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message here, press Enter to send
chat.resendConfirmDescription: This will delete the current response and regenerate. Continue?
chat.confirmClearMessages: This will clear all message history for this topic. The topic itself will be preserved. This cannot be undone.
chat.noPhrasesYet: No phrases yet. Go to Settings to add.
chat.systemPromptPlaceholder: Click to set assistant system prompt

welcome.title: Welcome to AI Studio
welcome.subtitle: Start a conversation or try one of the suggestions below.
welcome.explainPrompt: Explain the concept of closures in JavaScript with examples.
welcome.writeCodePrompt: Help me write a function that finds the most frequent element in an array.
welcome.brainstormPrompt: Brainstorm 5 creative project ideas for learning web development.

assistant.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the assistant, but will not delete its associated topics. Continue?

settings.noProviderHint: Please add providers and available models in settings
settings.modelRequired: Please select a model for this assistant
settings.customModelPlaceholder: Enter a model name not in the list
settings.customModelHint: If the model you need is not in the list, you can enter the model name here.
settings.contextCountHint: Limit the number of history messages sent to the API. 0 means no history, disabled sends all.
settings.name: Name
settings.groupHint: After setting a group name, assistants will be displayed in collapsible groups in the sidebar. Leave empty for no group.
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Define the assistant's role and behavior...
settings.systemPromptHint: Define the assistant's role, capabilities, and behavior rules. Leave empty to use the global system prompt.

topic.title: Topics
topic.noTopics: No topics yet, click the button above to create one
topic.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the topic and all its messages. This cannot be undone.
topic.clearDescription: This will clear all message history for this topic. The topic itself will be preserved. This cannot be undone.
topic.deleteSelectedDescription: This will permanently delete {{count}} selected topics and all their messages. This cannot be undone.

provider.selectOrAdd: Select a provider or add a new one
provider.name: Name
provider.apiAddressTooltip: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible API
provider.noModels: No models yet. Click below to add.
provider.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All model configurations under this provider will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
provider.removeAllDescription: Are you sure you want to remove all {{count}} models under "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

general.title: General
general.autoLaunchDescription: Automatically start the application when you log in to your computer.
general.startMinimizedDescription: When enabled, the application starts hidden in the system tray instead of showing the main window.
general.closeToTray: Minimize to system tray on close
general.closeToTrayDescription: When enabled, clicking the close button hides the window to the system tray instead of quitting the application.
general.spellCheckDescription: Enable the built-in spell checker for text input fields.
general.notifyAssistantMessageDescription: Show a Windows system notification when an assistant reply completes while the app is not in the foreground.
general.autoCheckUpdatesDescription: Silently check for a new version in the background at application startup.

about.description: AI Studio is a local Windows desktop AI workspace that brings multi-model chat, translation, quick assistant, and selection assistant workflows into one focused interface.
about.tagline: Provider configuration, assistants, phrases, and history stay on this device, giving you a stable and controlled workspace for writing, reading, coding, and knowledge work.

chat.title: Multi-model chat
chat.description: Connect OpenAI-compatible services, Claude, Gemini, and other models, then organize conversations by assistant and use case.

quickAssistant.title: Quick Assistant
quickAssistant.description: Summon a lightweight assistant with a global shortcut for ad hoc questions, rewrites, and summaries.

selectionAssistant.title: Selection Assistant
selectionAssistant.description: Translate, explain, polish, or run custom actions directly from selected text.

localData.title: Local data control
localData.description: Conversations, configuration, and attachments are stored locally with cleanup and appearance controls.

about.checkUpdatesDescription: Trigger an update check immediately. Results appear in the application update dialog.
about.openGitHubDescription: Open the repository to inspect source code, issues, and release information.
about.projectOpenFailed: Failed to open the GitHub project page
about.viewChangelogDescription: Read the latest release notes and jump to the full release history.
about.changelogDescription: Release notes from the latest GitHub Release.
about.changelogEmpty: The latest release has no notes.
about.releasesOpenFailed: Failed to open the releases page

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Import/export local backup files, restore from local rollback copies, and manage cleanup options.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: These actions are irreversible. Export a backup first if you might need it later.

builtinTemplates.title: Built-in Templates
builtinTemplates.description: Reset or restore the templates that ship with the app.

overwrite.title: Overwrite modified built-ins
overwrite.description: Restore all built-in templates to factory content. Local edits to built-ins will be lost.
overwrite.confirm: This will overwrite any edits you made to the built-in templates and cannot be undone.

restore.title: Restore deleted built-ins
restore.description: Re-insert built-in templates that were deleted. Existing templates are not modified.
restore.confirm: This only re-adds deleted built-ins; existing templates are untouched.

clearChats.title: Clear All Chats
clearChats.description: Delete all conversations, messages, translation history and attachment files. Settings and providers are kept.
clearChats.confirmDescription: This removes every conversation, message, translation history entry, and attachment file from disk. Your providers, models, assistants, and preferences stay. This cannot be undone.

clearSettings.title: Clear All Settings
clearSettings.description: Reset every preference (theme, language, shortcuts), providers, models, assistants and quick actions back to defaults. Chats are kept. The app will restart.
clearSettings.confirmDescription: Every preference, provider, API key, model, assistant, quick action and selection action will be removed and defaults re-seeded. Your chats stay. The app restarts after confirmation. This cannot be undone.

resetApp.title: Reset Application
resetApp.description: Delete the SQLite database and the entire data directory. Use this if a bad migration has left the app in an unusable state.
resetApp.confirmDescription: This deletes the SQLite database, every attachment, every local backup copy, and all browser-side storage. The app restarts from a clean slate, as if just installed. Everything is gone and CANNOT be recovered.

cloudOverview.title: Cloud Backup
cloudOverview.description: The two destinations are fully independent: each has its own credentials, sync interval, and retention.

cloud.webdavHint: Generic WebDAV protocol — works with Jianguoyun, Nextcloud, ownCloud, etc.
cloud.s3Hint: Object storage that speaks the AWS S3 API — AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Aliyun OSS, Tencent COS, and similar.
cloud.syncOptionsScope: These settings apply only to {{remote}} — they do not propagate to other remotes.

network.title: Network
network.skipSslDescription: In enterprise VPN or proxy environments, enable this option if self-signed certificates cause connection failures.

display.title: Display
display.zoomHint: Use Ctrl+Scroll, Ctrl+/Ctrl- to adjust zoom, Ctrl+0 to reset.
display.fontFamilyHint: Set the default display font for the application.
display.codeFontFamilyHint: Set the display font for code blocks.
display.mathEngineHint: Choose the engine for rendering math formulas. KaTeX is faster and lighter, MathJax is more comprehensive.

phrases.title: Quick Phrases
phrases.description: Manage quick-insert phrase templates for the chat input.
phrases.empty: No phrases yet. Click the button above to add one.
phrases.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
phrases.clearAllDescription: This deletes every quick phrase. This cannot be undone.
phrases.contentHint: Use ${variable} to insert placeholders. Press Tab / Shift+Tab in the input to jump between placeholders.

quickAssistant.title: Quick Assistant
quickAssistant.description: Quickly summon AI assistant with a global shortcut, customizable in Keyboard Shortcuts settings.
quickAssistant.enableHint: When enabled, press the shortcut to summon the Quick Assistant from anywhere.
quickAssistant.shortcutHint: Global shortcut to toggle the Quick Assistant.
quickAssistant.modelHint: Select the AI model used by Quick Assistant.
quickAssistant.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
quickAssistant.systemPromptPlaceholder: Define the AI behavior for this action...
quickAssistant.systemPromptHint: Define the AI's role and behavior when executing this action.
quickAssistant.placeholderDefault: Type content to process, select an action below and press Enter...
quickAssistant.defaultPinnedHint: Keep the Quick Assistant on top by default. You can still toggle via the pin button.
quickAssistant.warningImageLimit: Only 1 image allowed. Remove the existing image first.
quickAssistant.warningImageReadFailed: Failed to read image. Please try again.

builtin-answer.name: Answer Question
builtin-answer.description: Ask AI a question and get an answer

selectionAssistant.title: Selection Assistant
selectionAssistant.description: Select text in any application to pop up a toolbar, then click an action to see the AI result.
selectionAssistant.enableHint: When enabled, selecting text will show the Selection Assistant toolbar.
selectionAssistant.defaultPinnedHint: Keep the result bubble on top by default. You can still toggle via the pin button.
selectionAssistant.shortcutHint: Quickly enable or disable Selection Assistant.
selectionAssistant.shortcutUnavailable: Shortcut registration failed — it may already be in use by another app.
selectionAssistant.modelHint: Selection Assistant uses its own provider and model, independent of Quick Assistant.
selectionAssistant.actionsHint: Choose which actions appear on the toolbar, or add your own.
selectionAssistant.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
selectionAssistant.excludedProgramsHint: Enter executable names (e.g. Chrome.exe). Selections inside those apps will not trigger the toolbar.
selectionAssistant.clipboardFallbackHint: Some apps cannot provide selected text directly. Enable this to simulate a copy operation as a fallback.
selectionAssistant.triggerModeHint: Choose how the selection assistant is triggered
selectionAssistant.triggerModeSelectedDesc: Show toolbar automatically after selecting text
selectionAssistant.triggerModeCtrlkeyDesc: Show toolbar after selecting text and holding Ctrl
selectionAssistant.textLengthHint: Skip selections that are too short or too long.

search.title: Web Search
search.hint: Configure the search engine used by the search action. Opens in the default browser.
search.customUrlHint: Use {query} as the search keyword placeholder.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Export and restore your AI Studio configuration. Chat history is not backed up.
backup.modeReplaceHint: Clear local data first, then load.
backup.modeMergeHint: Keep local data — backup wins on collision.

exportCard.title: Export
exportCard.description: Save the current data as a local backup file.

importCard.title: Import
importCard.description: Restore from a backup file — replace or merge.

rollbackCard.title: Local rollback
rollbackCard.description: Browse auto-rollback copies to undo a sync that turned out wrong.

history.title: Cloud backup history
history.desc: Pick a snapshot to restore. Replace clears local data first; merge keeps local-only rows.
history.empty: No backups in the cloud yet.

rollback.title: Local rollback copies
rollback.desc: Every replace-mode apply — cloud download, local file import, or cloud history restore — writes a snapshot of the current state first. Pick one to undo an operation that turned out wrong.
rollback.empty: No rollback copies yet — none will exist until the first cloud sync runs.

restartPrompt.title: Import complete
restartPrompt.description: Data restored. The app needs to restart to load the new data.

remote.dialogDesc: Test the connection before saving. Credentials are stored encrypted by your OS keychain.

webdav.subPathPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the WebDAV root
webdav.subPathHint: Optional. Backups go into this subfolder under the WebDAV root; new configs default to "ai-studio". Leave empty to write directly to the root.

s3.prefixPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the bucket root
s3.prefixHint: Optional. All object keys are prefixed with this; new configs default to "ai-studio". Leave empty to write directly to the bucket root.

builtinUpdates.title: Built-in updates available
builtinUpdates.description: Built-in definitions updated from v{{applied}} to v{{current}}.
builtinUpdates.confirmDescription: This will overwrite all built-in items with the latest version; any edits you made to built-ins will be lost and cannot be recovered.

translate.inputPlaceholder: Enter or paste text to translate... (Enter to translate, Shift+Enter for new line)

settings.title: Translation Settings
settings.promptHint: Use {source} and {target} as placeholders for source and target languages. Leave empty to use default prompt.
settings.temperatureHint: Lower values produce more accurate translations, higher values are more creative. Default 0.3.
settings.wordWrapHint: Wrap long lines in translation results. When off, use horizontal scrollbar to view.
settings.markdownPreviewHint: Render Markdown formatting in translation results. Copy still uses the original translated text.

history.title: History
history.clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all translation history? This cannot be undone.

modelManage.noCatalog: No preset model catalog for this provider

preview.placeholder: Type a model name to preview matching

modelManage.newDefinitionGroupHint: New definitions whose name does not start with "{{pattern}}" will appear under "Unmatched Models".

addModel.title: Add Model
addModel.modelIdTooltip: The model identifier sent to the API, e.g. gpt-4o, deepseek-chat
addModel.groupNameTooltip: Used for grouping models in the list, e.g. ChatGPT, DeepSeek

modelLibrary.title: Model Library
modelLibrary.description: Define model capabilities for auto-matching when adding models
modelLibrary.empty: Model library is empty. Click the button above to add a model definition.
modelLibrary.providerTypesHint: Leave empty to make visible to all providers
modelLibrary.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

modelGroup.title: Model Groups
modelGroup.description: Define grouping rules for remote models by prefix matching
modelGroup.empty: No grouping rules yet. Click the button above to add one.
modelGroup.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the "{{name}}" group rule? This cannot be undone.
modelGroup.patternHint: Prefix match — case-insensitive; longest prefix wins

keybindings.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keybindings.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts for common actions.
keybindings.conflictDescription: "{{shortcut}}" is already assigned to "{{action}}". Reassign it?
keybindings.conflictReadOnly: "{{shortcut}}" is reserved by the system shortcut "{{action}}" and cannot be used.

chat.noProvider: No model is set for this assistant. Please select one in Assistant Settings.
chat.providerNotFound: Provider not found. Please check your configuration.
chat.apiKeyMissing: API key is not configured for provider "{{providerName}}". Please set your API key in Settings.
chat.noModel: No model is set for this assistant. Please select one in Assistant Settings.

selection.noModel: Selection assistant has no model configured. Open Settings → Selection Assistant to choose a provider and model.
selection.providerNotFound: The provider selected for the selection assistant no longer exists. Please pick another one in Settings → Selection Assistant.
selection.apiKeyMissing: Provider "{{providerName}}" has no API key. Please set it in the provider settings.
selection.noModelSelected: Selection assistant has no model selected. Open Settings → Selection Assistant and pick a model.
selection.modelUnavailable: The model is no longer available under provider "{{providerName}}". Please re-select one in Settings → Selection Assistant.

quickAssistant.noProvider: No provider selected for the Quick Assistant.
quickAssistant.apiKeyMissing: API key is not configured for provider "{{providerName}}".
quickAssistant.noModel: No model configured for Quick Assistant. Please select a model in settings.
quickAssistant.modelInvalid: Selected model is invalid for provider "{{providerName}}".

translate.noProvider: No provider selected. Please select a model for translation.
translate.apiKeyMissing: API key is not configured for provider "{{providerName}}".
translate.noModel: No model selected. Please select a translation model.
translate.modelInvalid: Selected translation model is invalid for provider "{{providerName}}".

db.notInitialized: Database not initialized. Call initDatabase() first.

backup.fileInvalid: The selected file is not a valid backup file.
backup.schemaTooNew: This backup was created by a newer version of the app. Please upgrade and try again.
backup.remoteAuth: Authentication with the remote storage failed. Please verify credentials.
backup.remoteNetwork: Network error while contacting the remote storage.
backup.remoteForbidden: The remote storage rejected the request (insufficient permissions).
backup.remoteNotConfigured: No cloud backup destination is configured yet.
backup.busy: A backup operation is already in progress.
backup.applyFailed: Failed to apply the backup; your existing data was not changed.

updater.title: Application Update
updater.upToDateDescription: You are running the latest version ({{version}}).
updater.downloadedDescription: The new version has been downloaded. Restart the app to install.

error.rate-limit-primary: GitHub API anonymous rate limit reached. It resets at {{resetAt}}. You can open the Releases page to check for new versions in the meantime.
error.rate-limit-secondary: GitHub temporarily throttled this request. Please try again later, or open the Releases page directly.
error.http: GitHub responded with {{statusCode}}. This may be a network or proxy issue — please try again later.
error.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your network or proxy settings.
error.parse: Could not parse the response from GitHub.

conflicts.idExists: A template with this ID already exists
conflicts.nameExists: A template with the same name already exists
